title: Silky Greek Silken Mince Stew
description: A rich, umami-packed vegan stew using Greek mince for a smooth texture, cooked in one pot with pressure cooking for minimal cleanup.

ingredients.name: Greek mince
ingredients.notes: Precooked, finely ground plant-based mince (e.g., lentils or soy)

instructions: Heat 1 tbsp olive oil in a pressure cooker over medium heat.
Sauté diced onion for 2 minutes until translucent.
Add Greek mince and cook for 3 minutes to combine.
Pour in 1.5L vegetable broth and 1 tsp garlic powder.
Seal the pressure cooker and cook on high pressure for 10 minutes.
Release pressure naturally for 5 minutes, then check consistency.
Blend until silky smooth if needed, then serve.
